events.label: Bash
events.text:
cd /app/media && python3 -c "
import wave, numpy as np
w = wave.open('audio_engine_003.wav','rb')
print(w.getparams())
n = w.getnframes()
data = w.readframes(n)
sr = w.getframerate()
sw = w.getsampwidth()
ch = w.getnchannels()
print('sr',sr,'sw',sw,'ch',ch,'n',n, 'dur', n/sr)
"
